Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given a process tree model for a Procure to Pay process The current model has a sequence of Create Purchase Requisition Approve Purchase Requisition Then a parallel block AND with the following activities Create Purchase Order Receive Goods Receive Invoice Match Invoice to PO Pay Invoice Then Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The issue is that the parallel block allows these activities to occur in any order which is not correct for the domain

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: In a typical Procure to Pay process the order is Create Purchase Requisition Approve Purchase Requisition Create Purchase Order after approval Receive Goods after PO is created Receive Invoice can be after goods received but sometimes before or after Match Invoice to PO and possibly to goods receipt ie three way match Pay Invoice after matching Close Case

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Note There is some flexibility in the order of receiving goods and invoice However the matching step must occur after both the PO goods receipt and invoice are available

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The requisition must be created and approved before creating the PO The PO must be created before we can receive goods because we receive goods against a PO and before we can match the invoice because we match invoice to PO We must receive the invoice before we can match it obviously and before we can pay it We must match the invoice before paying We must receive goods before we can match the invoice

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Given the standard logic provided in the prompt 1 to 8 it is a strict sequence Therefore we should model the entire process as a sequence of the 8 steps

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Thus the corrected process tree should be a sequence of the 8 activities in the order given

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The corrected process tree is a root sequence with Create Purchase Requisition Approve Purchase Requisition Create Purchase Order Receive Goods Receive Invoice Match Invoice to PO Pay Invoice Close Case

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We are replacing the parallel block with a sequence The overall structure is still a sequence and no choices are necessary

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The updated model arranges these five activities in a strict sequence which follows the domain logic and prevents unwanted behavior such as paying an invoice before matching or matching before receiving the invoice
